ham.subject: Your Order #123456 Has Shipped! 🌟
ham.body:
Hi John,

Thank you for shopping with GearBox! We’re excited to let you know that your order of the XYZ Smartwatch (Quantity: 1) has shipped.

Shipping Details:
• Tracking Number: 1Z9V5HM2X8363842
• Carrier: QuickShip Express
• Estimated Delivery: Thursday, March 14th

You can view your order status anytime via the Order History page in your account. If you have any questions or need assistance, our support team is just an email away.

Happy tracking!

— The GearBox Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Account Has Been Compromised!
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We have detected suspicious login activity on your GearBox account at 03:02 AM UTC. For your security, we have temporarily locked your account to prevent potential fraud.

If you did not initiate this activity, we urge you to verify your identity immediately. Failure to confirm the details within 24 hours will result in permanent suspension of your account.

Please complete the verification process by clicking here: <URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Security Operations Team
